overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a gritty urban market area beneath highway overpasses during golden hour. The scene transitions from an open concrete walkway into narrow covered market corridors filled with stalls and debris, before emerging into a more open area with barricades and a multi-level parking structure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete path beneath the yellow overpass, approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the path in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow industrial building with blue signage reading ROLLAND
large concrete highway structure overhead with yellow support beams
metal safety railing along the right side overlooking a lower level
wet concrete path with puddles reflecting the golden hour light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive highway overpass with warm golden hour light streaming in from the side. The player walks along a wet concrete path next to a metal railing, passing the yellow Rolland building on the left while following a pedestrian ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with vendor stalls

events.description: turns left into covered market area with fluorescent lighting and vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: entering the covered market corridor, passing vending machines and makeshift stalls on both sides

notable_agents.action: person standing near a market stall on the right side

entered.detail: makeshift vendor stalls with corrugated metal and fabric coverings
wide concrete staircase leading upward in the distance
illuminated vending machine with red and white signage
shops constructed from corrugated metal panels with various signage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered market walkway transitioning from the open overpass. Fluorescent lights mix with golden sunlight as the camera moves past vending machines and corrugated metal shops. Concrete stairs are visible in the distance while the metal railing recedes to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market corridor with makeshift structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight market corridors past various stalls, debris, and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt pushing a cart through the narrow passage
person sitting near a stall on the left side

entered.detail: bamboo screen partitions dividing market stalls
plastic sheeting and fabric hanging as temporary walls
blue garbage bags and scattered debris piled against walls

segments.scene_description: Deep within the market, the player navigates narrow corridors lined with bamboo partitions and corrugated metal walls. The space is dimly lit with artificial lighting, filled with trash piles and makeshift stalls. Various NPCs occupy the tight space, including a person pushing a cart through the center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with traffic barricades

events.description: exits narrow corridors into open area with red and white barricades and parking structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the open market area with barricades, approaching the multi-level parking structure

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking across the open area toward the camera

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete traffic barriers blocking the path
large multi-story parking structure with palm trees on top
tall palm trees silhouetted against the golden hour sky

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow market corridors into a more open area bathed in warm golden sunlight. Red and white barricades block portions of the path while a large multi-level parking structure dominates the background. The environment shows scattered trash and debris with a few pedestrians moving through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide urban overpass into the claustrophobic depths of a market before emerging back into an open plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass where warm golden hour light streams across a wet concrete path and the yellow Rolland building. As the camera moves forward, the open air transitions into a covered walkway where fluorescent lights begin to mix with the sunlight among vending machines and corrugated metal shops. The scene then tightens into narrow, dimly lit corridors lined with bamboo partitions and trash piles, navigating past NPCs and a person pushing a cart through the makeshift stalls. Finally, the camera breaks out of the cramped market and emerges into a sun-drenched open area characterized by red and white barricades and a towering multi-level parking structure.
